task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Socioboard application as the admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Socioboard dashboard or interface is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile or admin settings are accessible).

task_completion.description: Verify the five specified beat teams were created in Socioboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A team management or groups list in the Socioboard UI displaying the teams: 'Politics & Government', 'Technology & Innovation', 'Climate & Environment', 'Finance & Markets', and 'Public Health'.

task_completion.description: Verify Emily Chen is assigned to her specific beat teams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Socioboard UI shows Emily Chen (emily.chen@socioboard.local) as a member of the 'Politics & Government' and 'Finance & Markets' teams.

task_completion.description: Verify Michael Okafor is assigned to his specific beat teams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Socioboard UI shows Michael Okafor (michael.okafor@socioboard.local) as a member of the 'Technology & Innovation', 'Climate & Environment', and 'Public Health' teams.

task_completion.description: Verify that 5 RSS feeds have been configured for news monitoring.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The RSS feeds or content monitoring section in Socioboard displays a list of 5 configured RSS feeds (including feeds from npr.org and wired.com).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Socioboard web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts to configure the system.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of database clients (like phpMyAdmin, sqlite3, psql) or terminal SQL commands being used to insert teams, users, or RSS feeds.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Socioboard application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the authentic Socioboard interface, not a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML file containing the expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly 5 teams: 'Politics & Government', 'Technology & Innovation', 'Climate & Environment', 'Finance & Markets', and 'Public Health'. Emily Chen (emily.chen@socioboard.local) must be assigned ONLY to 'Politics & Government' and 'Finance & Markets'. Michael Okafor (michael.okafor@socioboard.local) must be assigned ONLY to 'Technology & Innovation', 'Climate & Environment', and 'Public Health'. Exactly 5 RSS feeds must be configured in the system. Note: 'Morning Briefing Archive' and 'Sports Desk Legacy' are pre-existing contaminator teams and should be ignored.
